subject: [PATCH v3 11/11] selftests/mm: add PMD swap entry tests

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test suite to exercise PMD swap entry paths in the Linux kernel. The tests cover various scenarios, including swapping out and in of THPs, fork operations, write faults, munmap, mprotect, UFFDIO_MOVE, mremap, pagemap reading, mincore, MADV_FREE, MADV_WILLNEED, and swapoff. The test suite also accounts for the presence or absence of zswap, which can affect how PMD swap entries are handled. The tests verify that data correctness is maintained across these operations and that the kernel behaves as expected in different configurations.
